steps: Log in to your ShipEngine account or sign up at https://www.shipengine.com/signup/
On the API Management page, you will see your existing Production and Sandbox API keys
Click 'Generate New Key' (or 'Create API Key') to create a new key
Select the key type: 'Production' or 'Sandbox' (Sandbox keys start with 'TEST_')

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your ShipEngine API key. Sent in the API-Key request header (no Bearer prefix).

notes: Free developer account available — no credit card required to sign up
Sandbox keys start with 'TEST_' and can be used for testing without incurring real shipping costs
The API-Key header is used directly without a 'Bearer' prefix
Production keys require connecting at least one carrier account
Rate limits apply — check your plan for details
You can create multiple keys for different environments

test_endpoint.description: List connected carrier accounts to verify the API key is valid
